zh.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Uchdrud是Bishop Uchtryd和Mrs Uchtryd of Wales的女兒，於1115年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根利安達福。她於1138年3月4日與Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon在英國英格蘭倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1156年3月4日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Uchdrud是Bishop Uchtryd和Mrs Uchtryd of Wales的女儿，于1115年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根利安達福。她于1138年3月4日与Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon在英国英格兰倫敦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1156年3月4日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Angharad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Celtic intensive prefix an- + cār ‘love’ + the noun suffix -ad. This was the name of the mother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’). In the Mabinogi, Angharad Golden Hand at first rejects Peredur's suit, but later falls in love with him when he comes back as the unknown Mute Knight. The name has been strongly revived in Wales since the 1940s, borne, for example, by the actress Angharad Rees ( 1949-2012 ).

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Uchdrud was born in 1115, in Llandaff, Glamorgan, Wales as the daughter of Bishop Uchtryd and Mrs Uchtryd of Wales. She married Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon on 4 March 1138, in London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 4 March 1156, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 41.

fr.Caerllion, Llangadog, Monmouthshire, Wal: Caerleon, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Uchdrud est née en 1115, à Llandaff, Glamorgan, Galles, fille de Bishop Uchtryd et Mrs Uchtryd of Wales. Elle a épousé Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon le 4 mars 1138, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 mars 1156, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Uchdrud wurde 1115 in Llandaff, Glamorgan, Wales, als Tochter von Bishop Uchtryd und Mrs Uchtryd of Wales geboren. Sie hat am 4. März 1138 in London, England, United Kingdom Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. März 1156 im Alter von 41 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Uchdrud è nata il nel 1115 nel Llandaff, Glamorgan, Galles come figlia di Bishop Uchtryd e Mrs Uchtryd of Wales. Lei sposato Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon il 4 marzo 1138, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 4 marzo 1156, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Uchdrudは1115年にウェールズグラモーガンランダッフでBishop UchtrydとMrs Uchtryd of Walesの娘として生まれた。1138年3月4日にイギリスイギリスロンドンでIorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1156年3月4日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Uchdrud(은)는 1115년 웨일스 글램르건 랜다프에서 Bishop Uchtryd(와)과 Mrs Uchtryd of Wales의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1138년 3월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1156년 3월 4일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Uchdrud nasceu em 1115, em Llandaff, Glamorgan, Gales filha de Bishop Uchtryd e Mrs Uchtryd of Wales. Ela casou-se com Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon em 4 de março de 1138, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de março de 1156, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Uchdrud родилась в 1115 г. в местности лландафф, глэморган, Уэльс. Её родителей звали Bishop Uchtryd и Mrs Uchtryd of Wales. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon 4 марта 1138 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 4 марта 1156 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Angharad Verch Uchdrud nació en 1115, en Llandaff, Glamorgan, Gales como hija de Bishop Uchtryd y Mrs Uchtryd of Wales. Se casó con Iorwerth ab Owain Lord of Caerleon el 4 de marzo de 1138, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1156, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
